violations.description: EMPLOYEE HYGIENE (5 pts): Employee noted handling food while hands were contaminated and did not wash hands before starting work.

STORAGE/HANDLING CLEAN EQUIP & UTENSILS (1 pts): Clean storage container lids with debris build up in storage bin and frozen ice paddle in walk in freezer has debris build up on the paddle itself and on the tray storing the clean paddle.
CROSS CONTAMINATION (5 pts): Observed raw eggs being stored above chopped vegetables in the walk in cooler.
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted laying on counter in kitchen.

CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food noted being stored not covered in walk-in freezer. Observed a container of soup being cooled in the walk in freezer with ice build up and debris directly above.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Wire shelving in the walk in freezer noted not clean and built up with frost and ice.
